items.title: U.S. Soccer sporting director quits for Saudi role
items.summary: Matt Crocker quit as sporting director of the U.S. Soccer Federation on Tuesday, just two months ahead of the World Cup, to take a new job in Saudi Arabia.

items.title: Iraola to leave Bournemouth at end of season
items.summary: Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola is to leave at the end of the season, the club have announced.

items.title: UEFA dismiss Barcelona missed red card appeal
items.summary: UEFA have ruled Barcelona's complaint over the refereeing in last week's Champions League quarterfinal loss to Atlético Madrid as "inadmissible."

items.title: Jorginho rows back Chappell Roan criticism
items.summary: Former Chelsea and Arsenal midfielder Jorginho has withdrawn his recent criticism of the pop star Chappell Roan and issued a statement saying that he regrets "the impact that this situation has had" on the "Pink Pony Club" singer.

items.title: Mascherano verlaat Inter Miami per direct vanwege persoonlijke redenen
items.summary: Javier Mascherano is niet langer de trainer van Inter Miami. De 41-jarige coach vertrekt per direct bij de club van Lionel Messi vanwege persoonlijke redenen.

items.title: 'Veel toptrainers zijn behoorlijk rigide en zien vooral wat ze willen zien'
items.summary: Columnist Süleyman Öztürk over de selectiecriteria van toptrainers.

items.title: VI Live: 'Slot houdt Salah ook op Anfield op de bank tegen PSG'
items.summary: Dinsdagavond worden de eerste returns in de kwartfinale van de Champions League afgewerkt. Barcelona heeft wat goed te maken tegen Atlético Madrid en Liverpool hoopt op een comeback tegen Paris Saint-Germain. Daarnaast speelt het Nederlands vrouwenelftal een belangrijke WK-kwalificatiewedstrijd tegen Frankrijk. Volg het in deze VI Live.

items.title: England v Spain: Women’s World Cup 2027 qualifying – live
items.summary: ⚽ Updates from the Group A3 qualifier; kick-off 7pm BST ⚽ Moving the Goalposts | Follow on Bluesky | Mail Simon Hello! Gird thy loins, world – it’s a hugely massively enormous World Cup qualifier! Involved are the sides ranked first (that’ll be Spain) and fourth in the world by Fifa (no other group in League A has more than one top 10 side, notably), and the two finalists of last year’s Euros. Unlike England, downed 2-1 by Brazil in a friendly in their first game after winning that title, Spain haven’t lost since, but the two teams’ aggregate scores in six post-Euros matches – England 22-3 Opponents; Spain 14-2 Opponents (and with a much higher standard of opposition) reveal the quality of these sides. Eight-and-a-half months after they locked horns in the final of Euro 2025, England and Spain meet again on Tuesday night in front of more than 70,000 at Wembley. This time it is in qualifiers for the Women’s World Cup, another tournament in which they met in the final last time out. Despite the relatively brief period since the game in Basel, Spain have a noticeably fresh look with a new head coach and a crop of emerging young players. They have already won a trophy under Sonia Bermúdez, who led them to the Nations League title after replacing Montse Tomé, and, unlike England, are unbeaten since the Euros with five wins and a draw in six matches. Continue reading...

items.title: Liverpool sleutelt aan reclameborden Anfield na duimblessure Noa Lang
items.summary: Liverpool heeft aanpassingen gedaan aan de reclameborden op Anfield naar aanleiding van de duimblessure die Noa Lang in dat stadion opliep tijdens het Champions League-duel tussen The Reds en Galatasaray.

items.title: Stepanov ontvluchtte Oekraïne vanwege de oorlog: 'Moeilijk om daar te blijven'
items.summary: Artem Stepanov is een van de populairste spelers van FC Utrecht. De spits wordt van Bayer Leverkusen gehuurd en vindt steeds makkelijker het net. Stepanov is pas achttien jaar oud, maar heeft al het nodige meegemaakt in zijn leven. Zo is hij in 2022 bijvoorbeeld Oekraïne ontvlucht vanwege de oorlog met Rusland.

items.title: Should hair pulling be violent conduct?
items.summary: Manchester United's Lisandro Martinez faces a three-match ban for pulling Dominic Calvert-Lewin's hair. Is the punishment fair?

items.title: How bad analytics built a Tottenham team that is heading for relegation
items.summary: Tottenham are really bad and looking at the way this team has been constructed, one thing clearly stands out: This team is really bad at passing the ball, and that may explain their present malaise.

items.title: Football Daily | Manchester United are pulling their hair out but rules are rules
items.summary: Sign up now! Sign up now! Sign up now? Sign up now! Seeing as the Ifab laws of football decree that hair-pulling is an act of violent conduct that is punishable by a straight red card, Football Daily is somewhat perplexed by the controversy surrounding the dismissal of Lisandro Martínez at Old Trafford on Monday night. Approaching the hour mark of his side’s 2-1 defeat by Leeds, the Argentinian quite clearly yanked Dominic Calvert-Lewin’s hair, sending the Leeds striker’s man-bunned up tresses cascading over his shoulders by pulling off the scrunchy that was holding them in place without so much as a formal invitation. Should Spurs be relegated (no question mark, this isn’t The Moral Maze), it will be not only funny, not only a salutary Ozymandias moment – the €uropean $uper £eague, anyone? – but also a perfect opportunity for a club with an undoubtedly great heritage to take stock, give its long-suffering supporters a season of winning, and come back up in better shape than they have been since Mauricio Pochettino left” – Mark Dawson. Continue reading...

items.title: 'No fear, pure fire' - Arteta defiant on pivotal week
items.summary: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta wants the club to play with "pure fire" as they prepare for one of their biggest weeks in years.

items.title: Will Iraola's summer exit speed up managerial merry-go-round?
items.summary: Andoni Iraola's decision to leave Bournemouth could make it a frantic summer in the Premier League's managerial market, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

items.title: Iraola to leave Bournemouth at end of season with Premier League rivals on notice
items.summary: Manager’s future has been talking point for months Players told of exit after training on Tuesday afternoon Andoni Iraola has informed Bournemouth he will leave the club when his contract expires at the end of the season. He is expected to consider his options this summer with several Premier League jobs potentially arising. The 43-year-old’s departure could also open the door for the Basque to join his boyhood club Athletic Bilbao, but the former Borussia Dortmund head coach Edin Terzic is thought to be the frontrunner to succeed Ernesto Valverde. Continue reading...

items.title: ‘I could wipe the floor with you, man’: the exhibition on female football fans’ experiences
items.summary: Prof Stacey Pope’s showcase highlights how women have always been required to defend and justify their fandom “You can be the thickest bloke and you still think you know more about football than a woman,” reads a line from Newcastle fan named Jo around halfway into a new exhibition on women in football culture. “[They] say, ‘you don’t know what you’re talking about.’ Oh, I could wipe the floor with you, man, with my knowledge and how much I’ve been, how much I’ve seen.” “I love that quote,” smiles Prof Stacey Pope, a leading women’s football sociologist and creator of the Away From Home: The Untold Stories of Women Football Fans exhibition, alongside David Wright of Durham University’s museums, galleries and exhibitions Team. Away From Home runs until the end of the season at the Beacon of Light, and is available online. This is an extract from our free email about women’s football, Moving the Goalposts. To get the full edition, visit this page and follow the instructions. Moving the Goalposts is delivered to your inboxes every Tuesday and Thursday. Continue reading...

items.title: Sexist abuse of Union Berlin boss 'embarrassing'
items.summary: Union Berlin director of football Horst Heldt condemns "insane" sexist abuse directed at new head coach Marie-Louise Eta.

items.title: How Champions League could decide £100m Alvarez's future
items.summary: With Julian Alvarez's Atletico Madrid future uncertain, European football expert Guillem Balague looks at how pivotal their Champions League run could prove.

items.title: L'ex-Zèbre Hervé Koffi parmi les nominés d'un prestigieux trophée en France
items.summary: Les nominés au trophée Marc-Vivien Foé, qui récompense le meilleur joueur africain évoluant en Ligue 1, ont été dévoilés. Parmi eux, on retrouve Hervé Koffi, l'ancien gardien du Sporting Charleroi et de l'Excel Mouscron.

items.title: Maesschalck spreekt na de storm over Romelu Lukaku: "Hij was dat beu"
items.summary: Hoe zit het nu tussen Romelu Lukaku en Napoli? Niet goed, zo blijkt. De Italiaanse club is het gedrag van de spits beu en gaat zware sancties ondernemen. Ondertussen is Big Rom nog altijd in ons land om te revalideren. Al is hij bijna opnieuw fit.

items.title: Ondanks contractverlenging: dit wordt één van de heetste transferdossiers deze zomer in België
items.summary: Het verhaal van Nacho Miras leest als dat van een laatbloeier die plots de poort naar de top heeft opengetrapt. KV Mechelen beloonde hem met een contract tot 2029, maar in het voetbal zegt zo'n handtekening vooral één ding: zijn waarde is alleen maar gestegen.

items.title: La survie du RWDM sera décidée dans les prochains jours (et ça s'annonce mal)
items.summary: La question de savoir si le RWDM disputera vendredi son dernier match professionnel se pose réellement. Alors que la saison touche à sa fin sur le plan sportif, une menace existentielle plane sur le club, et elle a peu à voir avec le terrain.

items.title: Les dernières rumeurs, les officialisations : suivez le mercato en direct ! 14/04: Dibango - Slimani
items.summary: Toutes les rumeurs de transfert, toutes les officialisations regroupées en un seul article. On vous dit tout sur le mercato en Jupiler Pro League, en Challenger Pro League et sur celui des Diables Rouges... en direct !

items.title: Vanhaezebrouck laat niets heel na STVV - Club Brugge: "Amerikaanse politieagent op een kruispunt"
items.summary: De Champions' Play-offs is twee speeldagen diep. En er is al heel wat te doen geweest over de arbitrage. Op speeldag 2 vond Jonathan Lardot dat de refs een goede beurt maakten, maar daar is Hein Vanhaezebrouck het niet helemaal mee eens.

items.title: Le Standard aurait un oeil sur un latéral gauche évoluant en Ukraine
items.summary: Selon des sources africaines, le Standard aurait fait savoir son intérêt envers Yvan Dibango, latéral gauche du Kryvbas Kryvyi Rig.

items.title: Transfernieuws en Transfergeruchten 14/04: Dibango
items.summary: De transfergeruchten, het laatste transfernieuws en officiële transfers vliegen ons om de oren. Bij Voetbalkrant zetten wij alles voor u op een rijtje zodat u tijdens deze mercato niets hoeft te missen! Op 14/04 hebben we transfernieuws en transfergeruchten voor u over:

items.title: 'Standard laat oog vallen op bijzondere linksachter'
items.summary: Volgens Afrikaanse bronnen zou Standard zijn interesse kenbaar hebben gemaakt in Yvan Dibango, de linksachter van Kryvbas Kryvyi Rih. Een opmerkelijke transfer in de maak voor de Rouches?

items.title: Un match de préparation très solide pour le Maroc de Mo Ouahbi juste avant la Coupe du Monde
items.summary: Le programme du Maroc avant la Coupe du Monde 2026 se complète. Les Lions de l'Atlas disputeront un match amical sur le sol américain quelques jours avant que le tournoi commence.
